analyst_note: Asset-owner climate disclosure (NZAOA member). Quantified 2030 targets on a 2019 baseline; two MED flags — the targets are NZAOA/Paris-aligned rather than shown as SBTi-validated, and the climate transition plan disclosure is still being developed.

specificity.quote: the carbon footprint by 30% by 2030 and achieving net-zero
specificity.reasoning: Specific carbon-footprint and net-zero ambitions as an NZAOA signatory.

metric.quote: activities by 75% by 2030 compared to a 2019 baseline

target.quote: science-based targets aligned with the Paris Agreement
target.reasoning: Targets are science-based- and NZAOA-aligned, but the extract does not confirm formal SBTi validation.

time_horizon.quote: ambitions for 2030 ... net-zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050
time_horizon.reasoning: Near-term 2030 targets present alongside the 2050 endpoint.

scope.quote: of its carbon footprint relates to scope 3 greenhouse gas [emissions]
scope.reasoning: Operational Scope 1+2 and investment-footprint Scope 3 covered.

verification.quote: The report of the independent auditor is issued with the ESEF reporting package
verification.reasoning: An assurance provider is referenced but the assurance level of the sustainability data is not crisply evidenced.

consistency.quote: [Aegon does not yet have] a climate transition plan but is taking steps to disclose one
consistency.value: transition plan in development; no contradiction
consistency.reasoning: Capital-allocation discussed and no contradiction surfaced; the report candidly notes its full climate transition plan disclosure is still being developed.
